name: Providence
author: soccerjonj
description:
Custom map of the Providence, RI area and surrounding towns such as Pawtucket, Barrington, Bristol and Warwick. Generated using 2023 LODES Census Data and added demand for the following:

Universities: Brown University, Bryant University, Providence College, Johnson & Wales University, Rhode Island College, Rhode Island School of Design, Roger Williams University, Community College of Rhode Island: Flannigan Campus, Liston Campus, Knight Campus

Entertainment: Amica Mutual Pavillion, Centreville Bank Stadium, Roger Williams Park Zoo
